objective: Build pipelines and bring data to GCP for on-boarding data
business_context: Customer360 system for consolidating customer data through data onboarding pipelines
functional_requirements: Extract employee data from MySQL source system
Build data pipelines to ingest data into GCP
Process batch data from agentichub.EMPLOYEES table
acceptance_criteria: Data pipeline successfully ingests employee data from MySQL to GCP
Hourly batch processing completes within latency expectations (less than 1 hour)
Pipeline runs reliably in Dev environment
expected_outputs: Data pipeline for MySQL to GCP data ingestion

Request Type: *new development*
Ingestion Type: *batch*  |  Output Type: *pipeline*  (confidence 70%)
Run Plan: data_model → architecture → implementation_steps

Objective: Build pipelines and bring data to GCP for on-boarding data

Business Context:
Customer360 system for consolidating customer data through data onboarding pipelines

Functional Requirements:
Extract employee data from MySQL source system
Build data pipelines to ingest data into GCP
Process batch data from agentichub.EMPLOYEES table
Implement hourly data refresh mechanism

Acceptance Criteria:
Data pipeline successfully ingests employee data from MySQL to GCP
Hourly batch processing completes within latency expectations (less than 1 hour)
Data integrity maintained during transfer
Pipeline runs reliably in Dev environment

Source Connections:
  • mysql / agentichub | instance: verizon-data:us-central1:mysql-druid-metadatastore | 34.70.79.163:3306 | user: sa | tables: EMPLOYEES
